title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool from Anthropic that enables users to build design systems and generate branded landing pages. The tutorial demonstrates a four-step workflow including design system setup, asset generation, editing, and template deployment, positioning it as a Figma replacement for design tasks.
writeup: The video covers Claude Design, an AI design tool from Anthropic that automates design workflows including design system building and branded asset generation. AI Master walks through a four-step framework for using Claude Design as a replacement for traditional software like Figma, handling layout and producing production-ready output. Key concepts include design systems, code generation, branded content, and token access.
